monthPattern.label: pressure_month
monthPattern.summary: The month had real pressure accumulation. Too many problems repeated long enough to become the default operating soundtrack.

projectRollups.latest_summary: Tightened the launch path and exposed one unresolved blocker.
projectRollups.latest_next_step: Reset QA scope and force a vendor answer.
projectRollups.latest_needs_decision: Decide whether to cut the last QA edge cases from the release.

projectRollups.latest_summary: Pilot work improved after the demo deck cleanup.
projectRollups.latest_next_step: Use the pilot momentum to widen the customer thread.

nextMonthCalls: Do not let Close QA regression set become the default soundtrack next month. Reset the shape of that work in week one.
Treat Quarterly Launch as a deliberate month-opening decision, not something to let drift another week.
Protect the next move on Quarterly Launch: Reset QA scope and force a vendor answer.
narrativeHints: The month had real pressure accumulation. Too many problems repeated long enough to become the default operating soundtrack.
Close QA regression set did not stay contained to one week. It kept coming back into the review ladder.
Quarterly Launch ended the month worse than it started.
Do not let Close QA regression set become the default soundtrack next month. Reset the shape of that work in week one.
caveats: 3 expected weeks had no stored weekly review, so the month read is only partially chained.

supportingSignals.summary: 3/4 expected stored weekly reviews were available for the month.
